mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM saga_nodes WHERE saga_id = #{sagaId} AND photos IS NOT NULL AND photos != '' AND photos != '[]'

SELECT DATE(node_time) FROM saga_nodes sn INNER JOIN sagas s ON s.id = sn.saga_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND sn.node_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(node_time) ORDER BY DATE(node_time) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
